    E

    equals(Object) - Method in class com.model.MusicBand
    Checks if this music band is equal to another object.
    error(String) - Static method in class com.common.Response
    Factory method to create an error response.
    error(String) - Static method in class com.utils.CollectionFileManager.LoadResult
    Creates an error load result.
    error(String) - Static method in class com.utils.CollectionFileManager.SaveResult
    Creates an error save result.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.AddElementCommand
    Executes the command to add a new music band to the collection.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.AddIfMinCommand
    Executes the add_if_min command.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.AverageParticipantsCommand
    Executes the average participants command, calculating and displaying the average.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.CleanHeapCommand
    Executes the clean heap command, removing all elements.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.CountByParticipantsCommand
    Executes the count_by_number_of_participants command.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.ExecuteScriptCommand
    Executes the script file command.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.ExitCommand
    Executes the exit command, terminating the application.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.HelpCommand
    Executes the help command, displaying all available commands.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.ListEverythingCommand
    Executes the list everything command, displaying all elements.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.ListInfoCommand
    Executes the list info command, displaying collection metadata.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.ListMetaData
    Executes the list metadata command, displaying collection information.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.LoadCommand
    Executes the load command, reading data from file and populating the collection.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.ParticipantsByIdCommand
    Executes the participants_by_id command, displaying the participant count.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.RemoveByBestAlbumCommand
    Executes the command - does nothing (use executeWithString instead).
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.RemoveByIdCommand
    Executes the command - does nothing (use executeWithInt instead).
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.RemoveGreaterThanIdCommand
    Executes the command - does nothing (use executeWithLong instead).
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.SaveCommand
    Executes the save command, writing the collection to file.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.ShowHistoryCommand
    Executes the show history command, displaying recent commands.
    execute() - Method in class com.commands.UpdateElementCommand
    Executes the update command without a predefined ID.
    execute() - Method in interface com.utils.Command
    Executes the command with no arguments.
    execute(String, Map) - Method in class com.utils.CommandRegistry
    Executes a command by name with arguments from a Map.
    ExecuteScript(String) - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Executes a script file containing commands to be processed.
    ExecuteScriptCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for executing commands from a script file.
    ExecuteScriptCommand(String) - Constructor for class com.commands.ExecuteScriptCommand
    Constructs an ExecuteScriptCommand with the specified file path.
    executeWithData(String, Map, Object) - Method in class com.utils.CommandRegistry
    Executes a command with a data object (for add, add_if_min, update).
    executeWithId(Long) - Method in class com.commands.UpdateElementCommand
    Executes the update command with a predefined ID.
    executeWithId(Long) - Method in interface com.utils.Command
    Executes the command with an ID parameter.
    executeWithInt(Long) - Method in class com.commands.RemoveByIdCommand
    Removes a music band from the collection by its unique ID.
    executeWithInt(Long) - Method in interface com.utils.Command
    Executes the command with an integer parameter.
    executeWithLong(Long) - Method in class com.commands.RemoveGreaterThanIdCommand
    Removes all music bands with ID greater than the specified value.
    executeWithLong(Long) - Method in interface com.utils.Command
    Executes the command with a long parameter.
    executeWithString(String) - Method in class com.commands.RemoveByBestAlbumCommand
    Removes the first music band with the specified best album name.
    executeWithString(String) - Method in interface com.utils.Command
    Executes the command with a string parameter.
    Exit() - Method in class com.utils.Invoker
    Exits the application without saving.
    ExitCommand - Class in com.commands
    Command implementation for exiting the application.
    ExitCommand() - Constructor for class com.commands.ExitCommand
     
    extractMin() - Method in class com.utils.MinHeap
    Removes and returns the minimum element from the collection.
